title: I'm an Elementary School Student with a Pimp
overview: Sana Kurata, the sixth grader with a "pimp," struggles to deal with her class full of troublemakers.

title: The Whole Classroom Is a Monkey Mountain
overview: Sana continues to confront Akito, and the girls in the class join her.

title: Operation Eyeball, Toothball!
overview: Sana learns about Akito's weakness.

title: Lone Wolf, Awooo!
overview: Akito has stopped acting up due to Sana's blackmail, but now another boy vies for the "boss monkey" title.

title: Naughty Hayama, Where Are You Going?
overview: While Sana get Akito open up, Sana gets a glimpse of a family very different from her own.

title: Chicken-and-Egg Dum-Dum, Too Yucky to Eat
overview: Sana gets the Hayama family to watch her new TV drama.

title: Kurumi and the Wound-Up Love Rivalry
overview: Sana learns of Asako and Rei's past together.

title: A Juice-Drenched First Kiss
overview: Sana takes a field trip to help her forget why Rei has been acting so weird.

title: Pinch, Pinch, Sana's Love
overview: Sana copes with her surprising first kiss.

title: Tweet-Tweet, Love Flies Away
overview: Sana meets Aono, Tsuyoshi's younger sister.

title: Father, You Are His Father
overview: Sana goes back to focusing more on her work, taking on several commercials with her Child's Toy co-star, Zenjiro.

title: This Time, Sana Is the Lonely Wolf
overview: Rei signs Sana up for too many commercials, and causes her to forget a promise she made to her friends.

title: My Name Is Going to Change
overview: Tsuyoshi misses school one day, and Akito and Sana get together to help their friend.

title: The Summer of My Promise (1)
overview: Everyone is excited about a class camping trip. While Sana looks cheerful as usual, Akito notices that she is worried about something.

title: The Summer of My Promise (2)
overview: Akito does his best to comfort a distraught Sana, who's still fearing the potential aftermath of Misako's book getting published.

title: Heart-Pounding Twice Over
overview: Sana performs in a play and invites her classmates, teachers, and Naozumi.

title: Ah, What a Surprise! Mama's Book
overview: Misako's book "My Daughter and I" has been released.

title: A Hungry Pair Plays Hide-and-Seek
overview: Sana stays the night with the Hayama family.

title: The Daughter Cries, and the Mother Cries, Too
overview: Sana meets her biological mother and half-sister.

title: Feeling Good with a Sana-chan Quiz!
overview: A recap episode set up as quiz show hosted by series mascot, Babbit, and "Child's Toy" host, Zenjiro, recapping from the start of the story to the end of the love-triangle arc.

title: Could Be a Small-Size Hayama
overview: Sana visits Kamura Academy with Naozumi.

title: Heart of Karate and Announcement of Retirement
overview: Akito begins studying karate, but isn't happy with his first lessons.

title: Clear, with Occasional Gone Missing
overview: Sana helps find Mariko, who sneaks into the set of "Child's Toy" to find Sana.

title: Math Life Drives Me Batty
overview: Principal Narunaru goes on a business trip, and Ms. Andoh takes this opportunity to threaten Class 3 of failing them and preventing them from advancing to junior high school.

title: A Band-Aid for the Heart?
overview: Due to the pond-incident earlier in the school year, where Mami was nearly drowned by Akito and his old goons, Mami is now traumatized and scared of Akito.

title: Cock-a-Doodle-Doo, Morning Is Coming
overview: Sana's gift to Aono, the little baby chick, has now become a full-grown rooster.

title: Give Me Sympathy and Lend Me Money
overview: Misako's ex-husband, Ryousuke Kashima asks Sana for a favor, Akito and Tsuyoshi become worried about her and decide to follow them around.

title: Love-Love, Father Hayama's Song
overview: Sana and Tsuyoshi visit Akito's mother's grave with the Hayama family, which is also Akito's birthday.

title: She's Here! Mother's Mother
overview: Misako's mother Shizuka visits Misako and Sana in Tokyo.

title: My Boyfriend Has to Grin and Bear It
overview: Asako stars in a romantic drama with popular performer Takuya Kimochi, and rumors begin.

title: The Snake Stomps in with His Shoes Still On
overview: A tabloid photographer named Kurosaki is determined to get a scoop on Sana.

title: Dad, You've Been Arrested
overview: Tsuyoshi's father is thrown in jail, and Tsuyoshi and his sister are picked on by their classmates.

title: Love Tastes Like Curry
overview: The boys and girls of Class 3 battle it out over after-school cleaning chores and is escalated further once Ms. Mitsuya and Mr. Tanaka argue about their upcoming wedding and their life after marriage.

title: A Singing Heart Goes 3, 2, 1
overview: It's Zenjiro's birthday so Sana plans to hold a birthday party for him.

title: There Is a Reason for These Presents
overview: Tsuyoshi receives an anonymous gift.

title: Take Me to Kusatsu
overview: Winter vacation brings a trip to the Kurata Hot Springs Inn in Kusatsu.

title: Kiss! Fight! Karate and Trumpet
overview: Akito stresses about trying to buy a gift for Sana, and Sana stresses about a job.

title: A Heart-Pounding Kiss at Christmas
overview: Sana hosts her and Akito's middle birthday/Christmas party.

title: 100 Haya-Moths and the Scales of Fury
overview: Moth versions of Akito, known as Haya-moths, turn everyone into moth versions of themselves.

title: Suddenly, One Day, I'm a Homeless Girl
overview: The Kurata household copes with a major setback.

title: He Got Me Blacklisted
overview: Sana can not find work. But it seems to be bigger than everyone expects.

title: The Delirious Nick-of-Time Deadline
overview: Onda had asked Sana to write a book. Sana then puts off the book until there's only about a week left.

title: My Boyfriend Is Like a Father to Me
overview: Reporters believe Sana and Takeshi to be father and daughter, but Sana says that it's not true and then declares that they are lovers.

title: Gomi-kun, Gomi-kun, Where Are You Going?
overview: Gomi does some shoplifting, and then he runs away. But, runs into Akito leaving the stolen loot.

title: Mixed Feelings About Valentines
overview: Takeshi misses work, leading everyone to believe he drops out.

title: Am I Wrong for Running Away?
overview: Sana's book hit the store shelves, but Mami wasn't mentioned anywhere in the book.

title: Under the Same Roof with You
overview: The apartment that Sana stayed in gets torn down, and for another week, the Kurata family is homeless.

title: Father, You Are My Father
overview: Misako learns something about Takeshi.

title: This Is Our Last Scene Together
overview: Takeshi find outs that Sana is actually his daughter.

title: Spring Comes In an Avalanche of Tears
overview: Depressed by the death of Takeshi, Sana leaves for the mountains and Akito convinces her to come home.

title: Up to Today, and as of Tomorrow
overview: A clipshow episode where Zenjiro recruits several of Sana's friends to discuss the relationship between Sana and Akito.

title: The Best Friend I Met in the Restroom
overview: It's the first day of middle school, and Sana meets a new girl, Fuka, in the bathroom. They discover they have much in common.

title: My Life Plan Went Kaput All Because of a Kiss
overview: Fuka tells Sana why she slapped Akito, and about how Akito ruined her life by stealing her first kiss in kindergarten.

title: Sana Wasn't Ready for Love
overview: Sana tells Tsuyoshi that she doesn't believe in love anymore because of what happened with Rei.

title: The Actress Is Holing Up in the Mountains
overview: Sana leaves to film a movie in a secluded mountain area.

title: I'm Seriously, Seriously, for Real, Serious
overview: Sana and the crew arrive at the movie set location in the mountains.

title: A Fakey Boyfriend Lured in by Sushi
overview: Fuka asks Akito to be her boyfriend, and bribes him with sushi, so she won't lose face to her old friends.

title: Lovey Dovey Times in the Mountains
overview: Naozumi confesses his feelings to Sana.

title: Getting Over Injuries and Storms
overview: Sana gets attacked by Naozumi's fans.

title: Somtimes You Realize You're in Love Once You've Been Rejected
overview: Upon finding out that Akito is going out with her best friend, Fuka, she comes to realize her true feelings towards him.

title: I'm Not Going to Cry Just Because My Heart's Broken
overview: Sana's mom visits her on the set and tries to cheer her up.

title: This Summer Literally Burned Up
overview: Sana faces a dangerous situation while filming a movie scene inside the burning mansion.

title: You Can't Believe the Rumors
overview: Sana deals with tabloid rumors of her and Nauzomi dating.

title: The Truth Has to Be Somewhere
overview: Naozumi reveals the true nature of his rationship with Sana on live television broadcast, and also exposes her feelings toward Akito.

title: And Now, Those Two Face a Long Goodbye
overview: After mutual confessions, Sana and Akito argue, but they are interrupted by a nurse.

title: Run Away, Run Away, Across the Sea
overview: Sana and Naozumi leave for New York to star in a Broadway musical together.

title: New York Is Filled with Suspense
overview: Strange incidents keep happening to Sana and Naozumi upon their arrival in New York.

title: The World Is Filled with Mysteries
overview: Rei goes to Hollywood to find Mr. Hamilton, while Sana and Naozumi begin rehearsals.

title: You Also Have Emerald Eyes
overview: Sana and Naozumi discover the truth about the mysterious ghost they've been seeing.

title: Lunchtime Seems Dangerous
overview: Sana, Rei and Naozumi spend their first night at the hotel and Naozumi encounters the strange man from before.

title: The Mother Was a Complete Surprise
overview: Brad reveals why he is terrorizing Sana and Naozumi.

title: You Found Out Too Much About My Secret
overview: Brad tells Naozumi the background of his relationship with Secil.

title: The Stupid American Parent and Child
overview: Secil deals with feeling unwanted and unloved due to her injury.

title: The Mother Is Gleefully Plotting Away
overview: Yuko has decided to use Naozumi as a tool to get fame.

title: Where in Manhattan Is My Daughter?
overview: Secil runs away after overhearing a conversation between Yuko and Naozumi.

title: Should I Go Home? Maybe I Should
overview: Naozumi and Sana weigh their options after Naozumi learns of his mother's true intentions.

title: Papa, This Is Your Fault!
overview: Naozumi and Sana reconsider their decision to return to Japan and instead meet with the Hamilton family.

title: First and Final Fight Between Parent and Child
overview: As Yuko's luck runs out, she and Naozumi fight over her treatment of him.

title: There Are Fathers Who Just Can't Be Fathers
overview: Gary and Naozumi attempt to adapt to their newfound relationship.

title: Sing One More Time, 3, 2, 1
overview: Sana and Naozumi defy a new law prohibiting singing and music.

title: Hello, Goodbye, My Love
overview: Sana and Naozumi recall to their time in New York on their return to Japan.

title: We've Been Getting Along Great Ever Since
overview: Naozumi and Sana re-adjust to life in Japan.

title: Only the Best Couples
overview: Sana's friends welcome her back and pay her a visit where she announces that she and Naozumi are officially a couple.

title: The New Manager Is a PYT
overview: Naozumi is suspicious of his new manager, Riho.

title: There Were Lines That Just Couldn't Be Said
overview: Sana objects to script dialogue that requires her to call another character a "devil."

title: Everything Is Clearer Now That I Can't See
overview: Fuka's temporary blindness allows her to see Sana and Akito's feelings toward each other.

title: Fighting, Separation, How Will It End?
overview: Fuka and Akito assess their relationship.

title: So This Kind of Day Has Come
overview: Sand decides to quit acting and return to school.

title: Hallelujah on Christmas Eve? My Heart
overview: Sana reflects on her feelings toward Akito and Naozumi.

title: Mecha Hayama Mama Is Mama Hayama / The Magical Curse Is Uri Uri Urinal
overview: In this fantasy episode, Hayama's father builds a mother robot.

title: The New Year Came and So Did a Fan
overview: Sana's fan club is disappointed by her lack of acting work.

title: The Easiest but Not Math Video
overview: Sana doesn't understand the subject she's trying to teach for her new job.

title: They're Appearing with the Same Name
overview: Sana gets a strange letter from someone using her name.

title: If You Rock and Roll for a Child's Toy Spring
overview: Sana and Zenjiro are reunited in the new series "Kodocha."

title: Maybe Things Can Go Back to Normal
overview: Takaishi and Fuka are now both single. Can Sana and Zenjiro play Cupid and help these two get together?

title: Waiting but Rushing Adults in Love
overview: Asako is getting ready to leave for London but Rei is not ready to give up his career for her. Is this the end of their relationship?

title: The Happiness Project: Now Lend Me Money
overview: Misako's ex-husband is back again to ask for money. But this time, he is serious. At least, he thinks he is...

title: Big Sis Seems to Be in Love
overview: It's Akito's sister who falls in love with the "perfect" guy. But it seems that the guy is a massive playboy, and is dating many other girls.

title: The Karate Club Is Great, Come Check It Out
overview: Sana wants to form a karate club for Akito's sake.

title: The Blackboard Erasers Disappeared
overview: The new karate club member, Nakao, cannot find any meaning in his existence and chooses to rot away in the north wing with the blackboard erasers.

title: All Three of Them Disappeared
overview: Other kids started talking bad about Akito and Sana and Jinbou Elementary School's 6th grade Class 3.

title: Kodocha Continues Always and Forever!
overview: Sengoku's evil plot to expel Akito is revealed.
